ModMetaData.name: Zed Zed Zed Status Cleanup
ModMetaData.author: Johnny Berry / Vyberware
ModMetaData.description: Compatibility addon for Zed Zed Zed. Keeps Zombie Infection as its own visible status, then folds Zombie Rot, Reanimating, and Fully Reanimated into one cleaner Reanimation status in the health tab, while keeping turning pawns in their fake death coma shown as Reanimating until the turn is truly finished.
